regional_cost_note: Fencing in Whangārei typically costs $160–$300/m for timber paling, $210–$370/m for Colorsteel, and $320–$650/m for glass pool fencing. Northland rates are broadly in line with the national average, with some capacity constraints for specialist trades. Prices include posts, rails, labour, and removal of old fencing — confirm what's included in any quote.
